name: Lutein
summary: Decision-ready summary: Lutein is best framed for macular pigment support; age-related eye health; screen-heavy lifestyle support; safety screen: none significant; review pregnancy supplement stack.
description: Lutein supports eye health; macular pigment; vision with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v10.0: Lutein/zeaxanthin strongest context is AREDS2-style macular support, not generic eyesight claims.
claimMap.notes: v10.0: Lutein/zeaxanthin strongest context is AREDS2-style macular support, not generic eyesight claims.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: AREDS2 formula uses lutein 10 mg plus zeaxanthin 2 mg/day
